AI Tool Reviews

Honest, hands-on reviews. We test every tool on real freelance projects so you know what's worth your money.

HubSpot AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) Review 2026: Tracking Brand Visibility in AI Answers

In-depth review of HubSpot's new AEO tool launched in April 2026, designed to monitor and optimize brand presence in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

Rating: 9/10 $50/mo (standalone) or included with Marketing Hub Pro/Enterprise

Surfer SEO Sites Review 2026: The All-in-One SEO Strategy Hub

In-depth review of Surfer SEO's new 'Sites' feature launched in April 2026, designed to centralize SEO workflows with real-time Google Search Console insights.

Rating: 8.5/10 Included with Surfer SEO subscription (starting at $89/mo Essential)

Carly AI Review 2026: Is It Worth $19/mo for Solopreneur Scheduling?

An in-depth look at Carly AI's scheduling assistant, testing its email/SMS automation, learning capabilities, and value for freelancers drowning in meeting coordination.

Rating: 8/10 $19/mo (Personal Plan)

DeepSeek V4 Review: The 1 Trillion Parameter AI Model That's Reshaping Freelance Coding and Analysis

An in-depth review of DeepSeek V4's capabilities, pricing, and real-world use cases for solopreneur freelancers

Rating: 4.5/10 $0.14 input / $0.28 output per 1M tokens (API)

MWM AI Review 2026: Turn App Ideas into iOS Businesses in Minutes

Hands-on review of MWM AI, the platform that transforms simple prompts into native iOS app businesses with built-in monetization and distribution.

Rating: 8.5/10 $19/mo Starter

Jasper AI Review 2026: Is It Worth $49/mo for Freelancers?

Three months of testing Jasper AI on real client work. Here's our honest verdict on whether it's worth the premium price.

Rating: 8.5/10 $49/mo

Notion AI Review 2026: Best All-in-One Workspace for Solopreneurs?

Six months of daily Notion use. Here's whether the AI add-on is worth $10/mo and if Notion can really replace your entire tool stack.

Rating: 8/10 Free + $10/mo AI add-on
